context: Tests whether the agent correctly flags deprecated symbols for human review without modifying their docs, detects and updates a stale body-only docstring whose description now contradicts the refactored logic, and leaves unchanged a body-only change whose docstring remains accurate.

checklist.name: Deprecated function flagged
checklist.description: get_user_balance is flagged as [NEEDS HUMAN REVIEW] in the report due to the @deprecated decorator being added

checklist.name: Deprecated docs not modified
checklist.description: The get_user_balance docstring is NOT auto-updated or altered — it remains exactly as it was in the source

checklist.name: Stale docstring updated
checklist.description: The calculate_tax docstring description is updated because 'flat rate' no longer describes the tiered bracket behavior

checklist.name: Updated label used
checklist.description: The report shows 'Updated' (not 'Would Update') for calculate_tax, confirming --apply mode was used

checklist.name: format_currency skipped
checklist.description: format_currency does NOT appear in the Updated section — its body may have changed but the docstring remains accurate (or it wasn't changed at all)

checklist.name: README backtick proposal
checklist.description: The backtick mentions of `calculate_tax`, `format_currency`, or `get_user_balance` in README are identified as candidates for proposed updates

checklist.name: README not auto-written
checklist.description: README.md is NOT modified on disk — all README changes are proposals shown in the report only

checklist.name: Proposed diff format
checklist.description: Any proposed README updates are shown in diff format (with + and - lines), not as free-form text

checklist.name: NEEDS HUMAN REVIEW explained
checklist.description: The [NEEDS HUMAN REVIEW] entry for get_user_balance includes an explanation of why it requires review

checklist.name: Report saved to file
checklist.description: A file named doc-sync-report.md exists in the working directory with the skill's output

checklist.name: Verification output present
checklist.description: The report or output shows evidence of the 3-point verification (symbol exists, params match, syntax valid) for calculate_tax after it was updated
